# CWE-421: alternate SSE channel races with unprotected shared transfer state.
lang: go
file: CWE-421-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var transferToken string

func WireTransferNotify(r *gin.Engine) {
	r.POST("/transfer/authorize", func(c *gin.Context) {
		transferToken = c.PostForm("token")
		c.Status(http.StatusOK)
	})
	r.GET("/transfer/events", func(c *gin.Context) {
		c.Stream(func(w io.Writer) bool {
			_, _ = w.Write([]byte("event: status\ndata: " + transferToken + "\n\n"))
			return false
		})
	})
}
